name: @keyma/runtime-cpp
description: C++23 header-only runtime consumed by Keyma-generated C++ models. Ships include/keyma/runtime.hpp (keyma::Value, schema metadata, intrinsics, from_value<T>/to_value<T> + value_traits<T>) plus the server/client consumer layer (json, errors, protocol, adapter/plugin/service interfaces, validate/format/defaults/serialize, KeymaServer, the Keyma query builder) templated on a bring-your-own-scheduler async policy.
